_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Lipid deposition was significantly reduced in livers isolated from Nf1 +/− mice but lipid content was nearly 3-fold higher in skeletal muscle from Nf1 +/− mice
details: Lipid deposition significantly reduced in livers but nearly 3-fold higher in skeletal muscle compared to WT mice
